title: Filtering and searching
excerpt: When Filtering or searching for items assigned to me, only the items with my name attached show up.  If I’m a member of a Team, the item(s) do not show up.  Now, I can search for a team, but this is a bit frustrating as …

posts.author: DougW (Douglas Warner)
posts.cookedHtml:
When Filtering or searching for items assigned to me, only the items with my name attached show up. If I’m a member of a Team, the item(s) do not show up. Now, I can search for a team, but this is a bit frustrating as I am a member of several teams, and performing multiple searches is not the best way and is prone to errors.

Am I missing something?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: 2 posts were merged into an existing topic: Team tasks not listed in My Week when filtering by person
